brief_rows.disclosed_capabilities: Water purification monitoring with soft sensing, estimator, predictor, supervisory control and integrated treatment units.
brief_rows.missing_project_elements: No node-modality sparse sensing contract, no low-frequency cyclic evidence window, and no replay/operator/release-gate sequence for writeback.
brief_rows.project_element_text: Project combines sparse observation, soft-sensor grey-state estimation, cyclic hold/recycle time buffer and evidence-gated release control.
brief_rows.prior_art_disclosure_text: Reference describes real-time parameter estimation, present-state comparison, event prediction and supervisory execution for water purification components.
brief_rows.distinguishing_technical_detail_from_pre: Reference is broader integrated monitoring/control; it does not expose the project's state-level external evidence package, focused catalyst response gate or replay/release boundary.
ai_suggested_review_focus: Confirm whether the cited source discloses the full seven-layer closed loop or only one component.
Preserve field replay, operator review and release gate as non-bypassable validation gates.
Check whether low-cost sparse observation, cyclic delay budget and hidden-state evidence are jointly present.
Separate generic sparse sensor placement from node-modality hidden-state evidence contracts.
